name: nonlinear-video-editor
description: Desktop MVP nonlinear video editor with Electron, React, and FFmpeg export.

scripts.dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k -n renderer,desktop "vite" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && set VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173&& electron ."
scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run build:electron
